data.content:
Plan v2 — addresses reviewer's revision request.

Persistence uses kno 0.16.0 native `verification_steps` (verified live
on this knot; v1's acceptance-overload is discarded). `Beat.acceptance`
is left untouched and the detail-panel acceptance editor remains;
verification steps are added as a separate, always-`string[]` field
with its own editor below acceptance. No parser/formatter helpers.

Implementation order: (1) pre-extractions to free room in 4 files at
the 500-line cap; (2) types through `KnotRecord` / `Beat` /
`CreateBeatInput` / `UpdateBeatInput`; (3) backend wire-up in
`knots-operations` (`--verification-step`, add/remove/clear) and
`buildUpdatePatch` diff math (covers AC6 persistence); (4) shared
`VerificationStepsEditor` component with keyboard-only nav
(Enter add, Up/Down focus, Backspace-empty delete); (5) mount in
beat-form (lightbox) and beat-detail (panel); (6) count badge column
on Queues + Active row overviews.

AC7 (scope refinement) is already satisfied by the existing
`Acceptance criteria:` + `{{acceptance}}` lines in
`scope-refinement-defaults.ts` — no wording change required, only a
regression test that locks the heading + substitution. The plan note
calls this out explicitly.

Test plan covers diff math (all combinations including clear), mapper
defaults, CLI arg formation, prompt substitution, and Storybook
interaction tests for keyboard behavior. Manual roundtrip test gated
behind `__manual_tests__/`.

Ready for plan_review.
